author: samcm
content: https://ethpandaops.github.io/blocksize/?fork=gloas&gas=300000000 I've updated the block size UI for Glamsterdam in case anyone had been using the old one 🙏

author: jtraglia
content: I don’t believe there is an 8192 deposit limit anymore. I see that the slider is limited to that value. The new limit is just the EL gas limit.
